Headline: #60 Blue Island/26th Temporary Reroute at 26th/Sawyer
ShortDescription: #60 Blue Island/26th buses are temp. rerouted via 26th, Central Park, Cermak, California and 26th, then resume their normal route due to police near 26th/Sawyer

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#60 Blue Island/26th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 26th, Central Park, Cermak, California and 26th, then resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to police activity near 26th/Sawyer.
